chunks.text:
H. No. 4964 / 52 OG No. 7, 3536 (July, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1471, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (i), PAGE ONE HUNDRED TWENTY-FIVE, SECTION TWOâ43 (QUEZON) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (i), page one hundred twenty-five, section twoâ43 (Quezon) of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is hereby amended to read as follows:

(i) Salay Barrio School Building, Dipaculaoâ

Repair.............................................. P1,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.
